card.name: Reinforced Ballista
card.text: Defender Exhaust — {2}{W}: This creature deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Arachas Nest
card.text: Drones you control have haste. When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 red Drone creature token with "This creature can't block." {1}{R}: Create a 1/1 red Drone creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Dun Banner
card.text: Vigilance {W}, {T}: Tap target creature. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Dol Blathanna Archer
card.text: Reach Outlast {G} ({G}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Tuirseach Bearmaster
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green Bear creature token. {1}{G}, {T}: Target Bear you control fights target creature you don't control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Impenetrable Fog
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt this turn by creatures your opponents control.

card.name: Myrgtabrakke
card.text: Flash Flying When Myrgtabrakke enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0 until end of turn.

card.name: Scepter of Storms
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance and reach. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Manticore Venom
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Bribery
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent creates a Treasure token. {U}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Counter target spell.

card.name: Carroballista
card.text: Menace Exhaust — {2}{R}: Gain control of target creature an opponent controls until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Waylay
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Eredin Bréacc Glas
card.text: Haste Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Eredin Bréacc Glas gains indestructible and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Whale Harpooner
card.text: Vigilance Exhaust — {3}{U}: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Toad Prince
card.text: Reach, deathtouch {3}{G}, Sacrifice Toad Prince: Destroy target artifact. Create a Treasure token.

card.name: White Frost
card.text: White Frost enters with five time counters on it. Players skip their draw steps. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from White Frost. Then if there are no time counters on it, exile it.

card.name: Harpy GWT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Drone GWT
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Novigradian Justice
card.text: Novigradian Justice deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to target creature.

card.name: Restore
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: Magpie
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each player creates a Treasure token. Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {W}. If you do, each player draws a card.

card.name: Rotfiend
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever a player casts a spell, this creature deals 2 damage to that player.

card.name: Battering Ram
card.text: Indestructible This creature attacks each combat if able. Exhaust — {7}: Put three +1/+1 counters on this creature. It gains trample until end of turn. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Dwarven Chariot
card.text: Trample Exhaust — {1}{G}: Put two +1/+1 counters on another target creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Old Speartip
card.text: Reach, trample Other creatures you control have trample.

card.name: Gutting Slash
card.text: Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

card.name: Treasure GWT
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Bird GWT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Summoning Circle
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, put a charge counter on this artifact. Then if there are five or more charge counters on it, sacrifice it, create a 4/4 colorless Golem artifact creature token and draw a card.

card.name: Svalblod Totem
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. Exhaust — {5}{G}{W}: Create two 2/2 green Bear creature tokens. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Johnny
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control that entered this turn.

card.name: Devil's Puffball
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -4/-0.

card.name: Excommunication
card.text: Exile target creature.

card.name: Royal Decree
card.text: Suspend 5—{1}{U} (Pay {1}{U} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with five time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Exchange control of two target creatures.

card.name: Chort GWT
card.text: Menace

card.name: Cadaverine
card.text: Destroy target creature unless its controller pays half their life, rounded up.

card.name: Dimeritium Shackles
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. {7}: Destroy Dimeritium Shackles. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Golyat
card.text: {1}: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, Golyat gains double strike until end of turn. If you lose the flip, Golyat deals 4 damage to you. Activate only during your turn and only once each turn.

card.name: Hym
card.text: Menace {B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Impera Brigade
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. They gain indestructible until your next turn.

card.name: Knighthood
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains first strike until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.

card.name: Lacerate
card.text: Lacerate deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Letho of Gulet
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Alghoul
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. When you do, target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Parasite
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. At the beginning of the upkeep of enchanted creature's controller, that player loses 2 life unless they discard a card.

card.name: Piercing Missile
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: Ruehin
card.text: Your opponents can't gain life. When Ruehin enters, each player sacrifices a nonland, nontoken permanent of their choice.

card.name: Trained Hawk
card.text: Flying {2}{W}, Sacrifice this creature: Secretly choose a nonland permanent target opponent controls, then that player guesses which permanent it is. If they guess wrong, destroy the chosen permanent.

card.name: Undying Thirst
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has menace and "Whenever this creature attacks, create a Treasure token."

card.name: Vernon Roche
card.text: {4}{U}{U}, Sacrifice Vernon Roche: Choose an opponent. If that player has more cards in hand than you, draw cards equal to the difference. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: War Chariot
card.text: Menace, haste Exhaust — {T}: Another target creature gains menace and haste until end of turn. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Torrential Rain
card.text: Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Gwent Cube Rules GWT
card.text: Each player starts at 30 life and with a copy of ‘Pass the Round' in play. Players may not take a mulligan. Any card may be played face down as a land with "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Emhyr var Emreis
card.text: Creatures your opponents control enter tapped. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Kambi
card.text: Flying Whenever you activate an ability of an emblem named Pass the Round, draw a card.

card.name: Quen
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Aard
card.text: Exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.

card.name: Prize-Winning Cow
card.text: Lifelink Whenever this creature dies during your turn, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, create a 4/3 black Chort creature token with menace.

card.name: Imperial Manticore
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, they lose 1 life for each creature they control.

card.name: Dimun Warship
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. Exhaust — {2}{U}: Return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Igni
card.text: Suspend 2—{2}{R} (Pay {2}{R} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Igni deals 3 damage to each creature.

card.name: Zoltan Chivay
card.text: Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Whenever you attack with two or more creatures, target creature blocks this turn if able.

card.name: Decoy
card.text: Return target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

card.name: Endrega Eggs
card.text: Defender When this creature enters, each player creates three 1/1 red Drone creature tokens with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Griffin
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return a creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Pitfall Trap
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target creature that dealt combat damage to you this turn.

card.name: Dimun Smuggler
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. {3}{U}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Bekker's Dark Mirror
card.text: The next 5 damage that would be dealt to target creature this turn is dealt to another target creature instead.

card.name: Experimental Remedy
card.text: Target creature gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Glorious Hunt
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Moon Dust
card.text: Target player sacrifices an attacking or blocking creature of their choice.

card.name: Offering to the Sea
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Harpy creature token with flying.

card.name: Tourney Joust
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Treason
card.text: Destroy target creature with mana value X.

card.name: Gaunter O'Dimm
card.text: Ward—Discard a card. Your opponents can't untap more than four permanents during their untap steps.

card.name: Weavess
card.text: When Weavess enters, create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying. Whenever another creature you control dies, you may pay {B}. If you do, target player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Regis
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Regis. {6}{B}: Create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Korathi Heatwave
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a land you control. Korathi Heatwave deals 6 damage to target creature.

card.name: Hemdall GWT
card.text: This token is all colors.

card.name: Grave Hag
card.text: Deathtouch {3}{B}{B}, {T}, Exile five cards from your graveyard: Target player sacrifices a creature of their choice. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mahakam Horn
Nekker
card.text: When this creature dies, you may pay {R}. If you do, discard all the cards in your hand, then draw that many cards plus one.

card.name: Nilfgaardian Knight
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. {2}, {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Noonwraith
card.text: Flying, lifelink Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may have target creature get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Dire Bear
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may pay {1}{G}. If you do, create a 2/2 green Bear creature token. {6}{G}: Double target Bear's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Dudu
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) You may have Dudu enter as a copy of a creature you control, except it has skulk and isn't legendary.

card.name: Axii
card.text: Enchant creature You control enchanted creature. When you cast a spell, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Shupe
card.text: When Shupe enters, each opponent may put a creature card with mana value 6 or less from their hand onto the battlefield. {1}{G}: Shupe gains your choice of vigilance, reach, or trample until end of turn.

card.name: Villentretenmerth
card.text: Flying Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Villentretenmerth deals 4 damage to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Lambert
card.text: Outlast {1}{R} ({1}{R}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay {R}. When you do, Lambert deals damage equal to his power to any other target chosen at random.

card.name: Drummond Queensguard
card.text: Outlast {2}{W} ({2}{W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it dies, draw a card.

card.name: Oneiromancy
card.text: Suspend 4—{1}{U} (Pay {1}{U} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Copy the next spell you cast this turn when you cast it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Spring Equinox
card.text: Suspend 2—{G} (Pay {G} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Until end of turn, whenever you tap a land for mana, add an additional one mana of any color.

card.name: Stammelford's Tremors
card.text: Suspend 4—{1}{R} (Pay {1}{R} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Exile target land. Creatures without flying can't block this turn.

card.name: Foglet
card.text: Flash {1}{G}: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to and dealt by this creature this turn.

card.name: Vigo's Muzzle
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack.

card.name: Armor Up
card.text: Target blocking creature gets +2/+4 until end of turn. You gain 4 life.

card.name: Ge'els
card.text: At the beginning of each combat, reveal the top card of your library. If you reveal a creature card this way, Ge'els becomes a copy of that card until end of turn, except his name is Ge'els.

card.name: Portal
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells. {2}, {T}: Return target creature you control to its owners' hand. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Adrenaline Rush
card.text: Target attacking creature gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Colossal Ifrit
card.text: Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) This creature can't attack unless defending player has more cards in hand than you.

card.name: Combat Engineer
card.text: {3}{W}: Exile another target artifact or creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under your control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Curse of Corruption
card.text: Curse of Corruption deals 5 damage to target creature and 5 damage to you.

card.name: Pulling the Strings
card.text: Cast this spell only if an opponent lost life this turn. Create three Treasure tokens.

card.name: Red Riders
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target land. {2}{R}{R}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Attacking creatures get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Spores
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. You gain 2 life.

card.name: The Naglfar
card.text: Exhaust — {X}{B}: Return target creature card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Trebuchet
card.text: Reach Exhaust — {R}: Exile the top card of your library. If it has suspend, you may suspend it this turn. Otherwise, you may cast it this turn. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Trial of the Grasses
card.text: Tap target untapped creature you control, then put three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Witch Hunter
card.text: First strike Activated abilities of artifacts, creatures, and enchantments cost {2} more to activate (including mana abilities).

card.name: Armored Arachas
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 red Drone creature tokens with "This creature can't block." {1}, Sacrifice a Drone: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: King Foltest
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't cast a spell this turn, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Temerian Drummer
card.text: Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Tunnel Drill
card.text: When this creature enters, each player may discard all the cards in their hand, then draw that many cards. Exhaust — {6}{R}: Exile up to three target lands. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Renew
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with three +1/+1 counters on it. Exile Renew.

card.name: Yennefer's Invocation
card.text: Put target creature on top of its owner's library. Create two 1/1 black Bird creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Crach an Craite
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a tapped Treasure token. {6}{R}: Crach an Craite deals 3 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Rot Tosser
card.text: Deathtouch Exhaust — {B}: Destroy target creature an opponent controls that was dealt damage this turn. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Garrison
card.text: Defender Whenever you attack a player, they mill five cards. (They put the top five cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Ale of the Ancestors
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a Treasure token. {2}, {T}: Any number of target players each mill four cards. (They put the top four cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Winch
card.text: Exhaust — {2}{U}: Draw a card. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.) {2}{U}, {T}: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Mastercrafted Spear
Forktail
card.text: Flying Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, this creature gains double strike and battle cry until end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.)

card.name: Scoia'tael Neophyte
card.text: Outlast {1}{G} ({1}{G}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) {T}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Blue Mountain Elite
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Crow Clan Druid
card.text: Outlast {3}{B} ({3}{B}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) Whenever you activate this creature's outlast ability, create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Dimun Pirate
card.text: Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) When this creature dies, create a 2/2 blue Harpy creature token with flying.

card.name: Blue Stripes Commando
card.text: This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control. Untap all creatures you control during each other player's untap step.

card.name: Water Hag
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target player mills three cards. Then if each opponent has fewer cards in their graveyard than you, this creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Fiend
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. Spells you cast cost {2} more to cast.

card.name: Epidemic
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may destroy target creature. If you do, its controller gains control of this enchantment.

card.name: Biting Frost
card.text: Tap one or two target creatures. Distribute three stun counters among them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Mad Charge
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Scorch
card.text: Roll a six-sided die. You may reroll that die up to three times. Destroy all permanents with mana value equal to the final result.

card.name: Teleportation
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Saesenthessis
card.text: Flying, trample When Saesenthessis enters, put a shield counter on another target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Aglaïs
card.text: {1}{G}, {T}: Put the top card of your library onto the battlefield face down. It's a land with "{T}: Add one mana of any color." {6}{G}, {T}: You gain 5 life.

card.name: Sigismund Dijkstra
card.text: When Sigismund Dijkstra enters, create a Treasure token. Whenever you sacrifice a Treasure, the next spell you cast this turn may be cast as though it had flash.

card.name: Priscilla
card.text: When Priscilla enters, move any number of +1/+1 counters from any number of creatures you control onto other creatures. Then proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Cahir Dyffryn
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you attack, tap target creature defending player controls.

card.name: King of Beggars
card.text: When King of Beggars enters, up to one target creature with mana value 3 or less becomes a Treasure artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color" and loses all other card types and abilities.

card.name: Eskel
card.text: Outlast {G} ({G}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) {3}{G}: Put target card from your graveyard on top of your library.

card.name: Kayran
card.text: When you cast this spell, exile target nonland permanent. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled. All creatures able to block Kayran do so.

card.name: Caretaker
card.text: Menace When Caretaker enters, target player mills six cards, then you may return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Morvudd
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Morvudd gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Whenever you cast a spell, Morvudd gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Dettlaff
card.text: Flying Whenever Dettlaff attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, he deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to target creature.

card.name: Assassination
card.text: Suspend 3—{1}{B} (Pay {1}{B} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Destroy target creature.

card.name: Champion's Charge
card.text: Suspend 4—{G} (Pay {G} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Target creature gets +4/+4 until end of turn. Up to one target creature blocks it this turn if able.

card.name: Commander's Horn
card.text: Suspend 2—{W} (Pay {W} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain vigilance and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Morkvarg
card.text: Morkvarg enters tapped. Undying (When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Alzur's Thunder
card.text: Alzur's Thunder deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: An Craite Greatsword
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that attacked this turn. Whenever this creature is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to any target.

card.name: An Craite Warcrier
card.text: First strike, haste Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.)

card.name: Arachas Behemoth
card.text: Vigilance, battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) At the beginning of each upkeep, create a 1/1 red Drone creature token with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Arachas Venom
card.text: Target creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. Create two 1/1 red Drone creature tokens with "This creature can't block."

card.name: Aretuza Adept
card.text: When this creature enters, exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If it has suspend, you may suspend it this turn. Otherwise, you may cast it this turn.

card.name: Artefact Compression
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature becomes an artifact creature with base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Avallac'h
card.text: As an additional cost to cast creature spells, you may pay any amount of mana. If you do, that creature enters with that many additional +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Backup Plan
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+3 and has reach.

card.name: Bloody Flail
card.text: Equipped creature gets +3/+2 and loses flying. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ciri
card.text: When Ciri enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {2}{W}: Exile Ciri. Return her to the battlefield tapped under her owner's control at the beginning of the next upkeep. (She evades Pass the Round.)

card.name: Consume Blood
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature you control, where X is the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Coral
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a 2/2 blue Harpy creature token with flying. {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Crow's Eye
card.text: Look at target player's hand. You may choose a card from it. If you do, that player discards that card, then draws a card. Create a 1/1 black Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Cynthia
card.text: Hexproof When Cynthia enters, target opponent creates a 4/4 colorless Golem artifact creature token. At the beginning of your end step, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Damned Sorceress
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls loses all abilities for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield.

card.name: Dandelion
card.text: Whenever you attack, choose target creature you control. Flip a coin. If you win the flip, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Otherwise, remove all counters from it.

card.name: Delirium
card.text: Enchant creature {1}{U}: Tap enchanted creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Djinn
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters or attacks, choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Target creature can't be blocked this turn. • Untap all creatures you control.

card.name: Emissary GWT
card.text: This creature enters under the control of an opponent of your choice. When this creature enters, its owner draws a card and creates two Treasure tokens.

card.name: Francesca Findabair
card.text: Flying {2}{G}{U}: Until end of turn, target creature gains flying and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: Freya's Blessing
card.text: You gain 1 life for each card in your graveyard. Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Gascon
card.text: Haste {1}, {T}: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Geralt of Rivia
Ghoul
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature card in your graveyard. {2}{B}, Remove three +1/+1 counters from this creature: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Harpy Nest
card.text: Defender {T}: Put a hatchling counter on this creature. Then you may pay {U} and remove three hatching counters from it. If you do, create a tapped 2/2 blue Harpy creature token with flying.

card.name: Iorveth
card.text: Reach {1}{G}, {T}, Discard a card: Destroy target creature with flying.

card.name: Ithlinne Aegli
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {T}: Lose all unspent mana, then untap all lands you control.

card.name: Keira Metz
card.text: When Keira Metz enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. Create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's 1/1.

card.name: Lamia
card.text: Flying Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, another target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Magne Division
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a tapped 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Mahakam Defender
card.text: Defender Whenever you activate an ability that isn't a mana ability, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Mercenary Contract
card.text: Each player secretly chooses a number, then those numbers are revealed. Each player with the highest number loses that much life. If you're one of those players, create six 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. Otherwise, create three of those tokens.

card.name: Morenn
card.text: Reach {1}{G}{U}: Turn Morenn and target creature an opponent controls with mana value 3 or less face down. They're lands with "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Operator
card.text: Whenever you cast your first creature spell each turn, you may pay {R}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it has haste and isn't legendary. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Pact
card.text: Suspend 2—{3}{B} (Pay {3}{B} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Target player's life total becomes 13.

card.name: Pass the Round GWT
card.text: {0}: Exile all permanents. End the turn. Take an extra turn after this one. Activate only as a sorcery and only once. (Discard down to your maximum hand size.)

card.name: Philippa Eilhart
card.text: Whenever Philippa Eilhart attacks, defending player loses 2 life. {U}: Until end of turn, Philippa Eilhart becomes a Bird with base power and toughness 1/1 and gains flying.

card.name: Phoenix
card.text: Flying If this creature would leave the battlefield, exile it instead of putting it anywhere else. You may cast this card for as long as it remains exiled. (This includes Pass the Round.)

card.name: Plumard
card.text: Flying This creature can't block. {1}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Prepare an Ambush
card.text: Draw two cards, then manifest a card from your hand. (To manifest a card, put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)

card.name: Princess Pavetta
card.text: Outlast {U} ({U}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) {U}, {T}, Remove two +1/+1 counters from among creatures you control: Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Queen Meve
card.text: At the beginning of each combat, you may choose target creature. It can't attack or block this turn unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Ragh Nar Roog GWT
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a legendary 3/4 Warrior creature token named Hemdall that's all colors. At the beginning of your upkeep, roll a six-sided die. If the result is 6, destroy all nonland permanents.

card.name: Red Haze
card.text: Target creature you don't control fights another target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Reinforcements
card.text: Suspend 4—{1}{W} (Pay {1}{W} and exile this card from your hand as a sorcery with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it.) Create three 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Roach
card.text: Whenever Roach attacks while saddled, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature. Saddle 1 (Tap any number of other creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Mount becomes saddled until end of turn. Saddle only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Shani
card.text: Outlast {W} ({W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) Whenever Shani becomes tapped, another target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Slyzard
card.text: Cast this spell only if you've cast another spell this turn. Flying, battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.)

card.name: The Great Oak
card.text: As The Great Oak enters, secretly choose two from among reach, deathtouch, lifelink, and hexproof. {B}{G}, Reveal your choice: Creatures you control gain the chosen abilities until end of turn. Activate only once.

card.name: Three Player Rules GWT
card.text: The starting player doesn't skip the draw step of their first turn. If one or more players would lose the game, the player with the highest life total wins the game. If tied, the player whose turn it is wins (or the next player in turn order).

card.name: Triss Merigold
card.text: Haste Triss Merigold attacks each combat if able. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Triss Merigold.

card.name: Unseen Elder
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Flying, lifelink Outlast {B} ({B}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Vesemir
card.text: Creatures you control have outlast {2}. ({2}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has lifelink.

card.name: Vilgefortz
card.text: Outlast {2} ({2}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.) At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses life equal to Vilgefortz's power unless they sacrifice a creature of their choice.

card.name: Wild Boar of the Sea
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent creates a 2/2 blue Harpy creature token with flying. Exhaust — {3}{U}{U}: Target player mills half their library, rounded up. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Woodland Spirit
card.text: Hexproof Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control.

card.name: Yennefer of Vengerberg
card.text: When Yennefer of Vengerberg enters, target opponent chooses an order for the cards in their hand, then reveals them one by one until you say stop. That player then discards the most recently revealed card.

card.name: Yrden
card.text: Creatures attacking you get -1/-1.
